name: @regkasse/localization
description: Shared i18n import/export/validation for POS and Admin

scripts.export: node scripts/export-translations.mjs --app frontend && node scripts/export-translations.mjs --app frontend-admin
scripts.import: node scripts/import-translations.mjs --app frontend && node scripts/import-translations.mjs --app frontend-admin
scripts.validate: node scripts/validate-translations.mjs --app frontend && node scripts/validate-translations.mjs --app frontend-admin
scripts.boundary: node scripts/check-translation-boundary.mjs --app frontend && node scripts/check-translation-boundary.mjs --app frontend-admin
scripts.usage: node scripts/check-localization-usage.mjs --app frontend --budgetFile i18n-ci-budgets.json && node scripts/check-localization-usage.mjs --app frontend-admin --budgetFile i18n-ci-budgets.json
scripts.ci: node scripts/validate-translations.mjs --app frontend-admin --strictMissing true --orphanPolicy error && node scripts/validate-translations.mjs --app frontend --strictMissing true && node scripts/check-localization-usage.mjs --app frontend-admin --strictMissing true --budgetFile i18n-ci-budgets.json
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@regkasse/localization: no unit tests — run npm run i18n:validate')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@regkasse/localization: no ESLint suite — run npm run i18n:validate')"
scripts.build: node -e "console.log('@regkasse/localization: tooling only — no build artifacts')"
